# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Implemented the pending regression coverage for w5da in src/cli/drain.rs. The bead-sync PR flow is now factored through open_and_watch_bead_sync_pr_with_tools so it can be tested with mock PR/open-watch ports, and the new test bead_sync_pr_path_pushes_branch_creates_pr_and_watches_merge proves the persistence path creates a drain/beads-sync-<sha> branch at HEAD, pushes that branch, creates a PR against master, polls/watches PR #77, merges it, and never pushes master or HEAD:master directly.",
  "outstanding_risks": [
    "br lint could not be run because br is not installed on PATH in this environment."
  ],
  "steps": [
    {
      "description": "Inspected the existing drain completion path, ProcessDrainPorts bead-sync helper, and drain harness coverage around PR open/watch and bead mutation persistence.",
      "order": 1,
      "status": "completed"
    },
    {
      "description": "Added a focused test seam for bead-sync PR persistence by routing ProcessDra
